case_title: NATIONAL COLLEGIATE STUDENT LOAN TRUST 2007-3 VS. ZACHARY S DAVIDSON ET AL

docket_entries.description: MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON MAR-02-2016 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ZACHARY DAVIDSON'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-01-2016 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Matters Admitted
Off Calendar Nov-10-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF NATIONAL COLLEGIATE STUDENT LOAN TRUST 2007-3'S Motion To Deem Matters Admitted is Granted, for reasons set forth in Plaintiff's moving papers and the motion is unopposed. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim and that complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Huibonhoa; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302/jpt)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2016 Set For Trial On Dec-05-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
